name: Brookfield Clubhouse
about: Brookfield Clubhouse is a golf simulator and event space that provides the entire facility exclusively for each booking. The venue features advanced simulators capable of replicating world-famous golf courses, with a realistic ball flight and terrain. It is suited for up to 75 guests and offers a heated/cooled environment, private event options, and BYOB alcohol policies. The space is ideal for corporate outings, birthdays, team events, and group gatherings, offering both practice play and event hosting capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulators with realistic ball flight and course terrain
Private facility use with no shared bays or equipment
Flexible booking options including open-ended event rentals
BYOB policy with full kitchen access for food prep
Family-friendly environment suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: BYO food allowed; full kitchen available for heating/preparing food
BYOB alcohol policy; cannot be sold on-site

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, we provide golf clubs, balls, and tees for your use. You're welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Absolutely! You can bring any food or beverages you like. We have a full kitchen for heating or preparing food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes depends on your pace and the number of players, but typical rounds take 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes! The Clubhouse is a family-friendly space suitable for both adults and children. Children must be supervised by an adult at all times.
